# JournalingSuggestion.ItemContent

**Structure**

A container for the information about a specific suggestion.

## Declaration

```swift
struct ItemContent
```

## Overview

When a person selects an event in the [doc://com.apple.JournalingSuggestions/documentation/JournalingSuggestions/JournalingSuggestionsPicker], the system invokes the `onCompletion` handler that your app declares for the picker and passes in a [doc://com.apple.JournalingSuggestions/documentation/JournalingSuggestions/JournalingSuggestion] instance. The journaling suggestion contains an array of structures of this type in its [doc://com.apple.JournalingSuggestions/documentation/JournalingSuggestions/JournalingSuggestion/items] property. Each instance of this structure contains one or more concrete instances of [doc://com.apple.JournalingSuggestions/documentation/JournalingSuggestions/JournalingSuggestionAsset] that represent the selection in the picker.

## Identifying item contents

- **representations**: An array of content types that a particular suggestion includes.

## Accessing suggestion data by type

- **content(forType:)**: Retrieves a suggestion’s contents by returning a structure specific to the given content type.
- **hasContent(ofType:)**: Checks if the suggestion contains information for the given type.

## Accessing suggestion data by type

- **items**: The individual items that compose the suggestion’s content.
- **content(forType:)**: Searches a suggestion’s items for information of the given type.

## Conforms To

- Identifiable
